title: DepthField
body:
# DepthField
This shader adds a **depth of field** effect to Minecraft, making distant objects blur while keeping close-up details sharp. It enhances visuals by creating a more immersive and cinematic experience. Easy to install and compatible with other shaders, this effect brings a professional touch to your gameplay.

inspiration by:LoLip_p
